projectName: Modelo de la Computación - Simulaciones ABM
projectDescription: Agent-Based Modeling simulations for student movement and traffic flow analysis
keyFeatures: Agent-based modeling of student movement across campus locations
Traffic intersection simulation with synchronized traffic lights
Collision detection and avoidance in traffic flow
Dynamic decision-making based on space availability
Statistical tracking and historical data analysis
publicApiSurface: ejecutar_simulacion(num_estudiantes, pasos) - Student simulation entry point
ejecutar_simulacion(ancho_ciudad, alto_ciudad, pasos) - Traffic simulation entry point
Estudiante - Agent class representing individual students
CampusUniversitario - Environment class for campus simulation
VisualizadorSimulacion - Visualization engine for student movement
Semaforo - Traffic light controller with state cycles
Ciudad - Environment class for traffic intersection
Visualizador - Visualization engine for traffic flow
EstadoSemaforo - Enum for traffic light states
